antipattern.symptom: Test file is 100% snapshot calls; failures unreviewable.
antipattern.root-cause: Author optimised for coverage % not behaviour.
antipattern.fix: Add an explicit behavioural assertion to every test; treat snapshot as supplemental, not primary.

antipattern.symptom: Tests stub global fetch with jest.fn; brittle across runtime upgrades.
antipattern.fix: Migrate to MSW handlers; remove fetch spies.

antipattern.symptom: Project uses Vite + Jest; tests need babel-jest + custom config; slow + brittle.
antipattern.root-cause: Project started with CRA, kept Jest after migrating to Vite.
antipattern.fix: Migrate to Vitest; tests run as-is in most cases.
